title: Manga The World (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces TW skin1 with the Manga appearance of TW (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces TW skin1 with Manga TW

Manga TW design is amazing so here you go. Added bonus of being AU Diego if you choose.

Changes the appearence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
